title: Cyanide Shaders
description:
Vanilla+ Shader, that supports Optifine and Iris
Barely affects performance
body:
- About

Cyanide is a simple yet decent shaderpack, with not too many lines of code.
The shaderpack is extremely optimized, and doesn't make the feeling of the vanilla game fade away.

Colors change based on time, and many improvements were made, with the inclusion of many tonemap operators to choose from, each one giving a different vibe.

- Requirements

A potato
